_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Lavalink
author: https://nyxel.my.id
description: Lavalink is a standalone audio streaming node for Discord bots, built on Lavaplayer. Powers high-quality, low-latency music playback without burdening your bot process. Maintained by nyxel-eggs.
startup: bash -c "mkdir -p /home/container/.pterodactyl && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Synxx12/nyxel-eggs/main/eggs/bots-audio/lavalink/entrypoint.sh -o /home/container/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh || { echo '[EGG] Failed to download entrypoint!'; exit 1; } && chmod +x /home/container/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh && bash /home/container/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh"

config.startup: {"done": ["Lavalink is ready to accept connections", "Started Launcher"]}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Lavalink Installation Script — nyxel

set -e

apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y curl jq

mkdir -p /mnt/server/.pterodactyl

curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Synxx12/nyxel-eggs/main/eggs/bots-audio/lavalink/entrypoint.sh -o /mnt/server/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh
chmod +x /mnt/server/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh

echo "[INSTALL] entrypoint.sh downloaded."
echo "[INSTALL] Lavalink JAR will be downloaded on first startup."
echo "[INSTALL] Done."

variables.name: Lavalink Version
variables.description: The Lavalink release to run. Use 'LATEST' to always pull the newest release, or pin to a tag like 'v4.0.8'.

variables.name: Server Port
variables.description: The port Lavalink will listen on.

variables.name: Server Password
variables.description: Password your Discord bot uses to authenticate with Lavalink. Change this from the default.

variables.name: Max Memory (MB)
variables.description: Java heap size in MB. Recommended: 512 for small bots, 1024+ for larger deployments.

variables.name: Plugins
variables.description: Optional. Comma-separated list of plugin JAR download URLs (e.g., LavaSrc, youtube-source). Leave empty if not needed.

variables.name: Cloudflare Tunnel Token
variables.description: CF Zero Trust tunnel token. Leave empty to disable.
